source.description: Six-panel contact sheet generated for a bold marker sunscreen-bottle sticker sequence, then cropped into lesson assets.
source.notes: Created as the July 2, 2026 current Doodlea.day lesson with a summer-weekend subject that avoids the existing firework and food lessons.

process_strategy: The frames keep one rounded sunscreen bottle pose while building the cap, label panel, wink expression, sun badge, marker fills, highlights, and shadow in order.

final_elements.name: rounded bottle body
final_elements.description: A squat rounded sunscreen bottle silhouette tilted slightly like a sticker.

final_elements.name: flip cap
final_elements.description: A small cap shape attached to the bottom edge of the bottle.

final_elements.name: label panel
final_elements.description: A simple blank label shape on the front of the bottle with no readable text.

final_elements.name: wink expression
final_elements.description: One open eye, one wink eye, raised brow marks, cheek dots, and a sideways grin.

final_elements.name: small sun badge
final_elements.description: A tiny sun icon on the label panel made from a circle and short rays.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: Bold marker contour around the bottle, cap, label, and face already present.

final_elements.name: yellow and blue marker fill
final_elements.description: Bright yellow bottle fill with blue cap and label accents.

final_elements.name: white highlights and gray shadow
final_elements.description: Small white highlight gaps and a gray sticker shadow under the bottle.

frames.visible_job: Adds the rounded bottle body with a slight sticker tilt and clear empty front area.
Adds the flip cap and a blank label panel on the already placed bottle body.
Adds the asymmetrical wink expression with brows, cheek dots, and a sideways grin.
Adds the small sun badge and thickens only the bottle, cap, label, and face already visible.
Adds yellow and blue marker fill, white highlight gaps, and a gray sticker shadow.

final_step.visible_job: Only reinforces existing outlines, deepens the marker fills, and sharpens the highlights and shadow.

rejection_checks: No bottle, cap, label, face, sun badge, color area, highlight, or shadow should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, fill, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same bottle pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
